name: camellia-plugins
description: Personal plugin marketplace for Claude Code

plugins.name: seed-kit
plugins.description: Lightweight PRD-first workflow: research / brainstorm / impl / review / wiki, all user-triggered and decoupled. State = prd.md checkboxes + evidence files; `seed done` is evidence-gated; no state machine.

plugins.name: sdd-kit
plugins.description: PRD-first SDD workflow: brainstorm writes package PRD with technical framing and ordered slices, impl executes PRD scope, review audits. Deterministic .arbor package state and .wiki orientation notes. Skills: research / brainstorm / impl / review / wiki / doctor / rules.
